action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed on deprecated 'verbose' in ReduceLROnPlateau (PyTorch env mismatch); train.py truncated at ckpt save (missing keys like embed_size/dropout risking predict.py load); best test AUC still 0.7563 (val peaks ~0.758). Curves show good initial drop but overfitting. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT core is effective (interaction embeds + per-skill preds + masking) but persistent code bugs waste iters; needs full clean rewrite for complete hparam persistence, no deprecated args, grad clip, robust ES/scheduler, jsonl logging only. Higher embed+moderate h+stronger reg/LR can raise val peak and close train-test gap without exceeding param limit (~fewM <<1B) or time (~60s/iter). Decision: Overwrite all 3 files with complete consistent versions; use h=1024/e=192/d=0.45/lr=2e-4/wd=1e-4/epochs=45/es_pat=12/sch_pat=5/bs=64; train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
